jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Sanofi India
jsonLd.description:
Sanofi India has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Ahmedabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sanofi India:
Sanofi India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sanofi India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
